news.title: Bungie details Marathon Season 2 and the new Sentinel class, with a free-to-play week and special sale planned, too

news.title: Hideo Kojima and Nicolas Winding Refn have teamed up for a Prada mode event teaser exploring "new creative possibilities through AI technology"
